Vacation Budget Calculator

Plan your vacation budget. Enter trip details to get a cost estimate for flights, accommodation, food, and activities.

FAQ

How much should I budget for vacation?

A typical domestic vacation costs $150-$300 per person per day. International trips average $200-$500 per person per day.

What percentage of income should go to vacations?

Financial experts suggest budgeting 5-10% of annual net income for vacations and travel.

How can I save on vacation costs?

Travel off-season, book flights 6-8 weeks ahead, use points/miles, cook some meals, and look for free activities.
